question: Will 5 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
notes: {"adapter_venue": "polymarket", "baseline_components": {}, "category": "macro/fed", "edge_vs_market": 0.069, "llm": {"confidence": 0.72, "enabled": true, "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "rationale": "Current date is late April 2026; by year-end there are only ~8 months for 5 cuts. The crowd price of 1.1% appears significantly underpriced relative to baseline Fed cutting cycles and CME FedWatch data typical in late Q2. Even in dovish scenarios, 5 cuts in 8 months requires sustained economic weakness. However, tail risks (recession, financial stress) make this non-trivial. Adjusting upward from crowd price to ~8% to reflect realistic tail-scenario probability while remaining skeptical of such an aggressive cutting pace."}, "p_yes_market": 0.011, "pricing_source": "mid", "snapshot": {"bestAsk": 0.012, "bestBid": 0.01, "id": "616907", "lastTradePrice": 0.012, "liquidity": "137713.37086", "question": "Will 5 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?", "slug": "will-5-fed-rate-cuts-happen-in-2026", "updatedAt": "2026-04-26T03:18:58.563091Z", "volume": "1160541.2602569973"}, "spread": 0.002}

question: Will Freiburg win the 2025-26 UEFA Europa League?

question: Will Aston Villa win the 2025-26 UEFA Europa League?

question: Will 4 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
notes: {"adapter_venue": "polymarket", "baseline_components": {}, "edge_vs_market": 0.0785, "llm": {"confidence": 0.72, "enabled": true, "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "rationale": "At 2026-04-10, we're already 3.3 months into 2026. For 4 cuts to occur by year-end requires cuts in ~8.7 remaining months. Current crowd price of 4.1% appears too low given that Fed typically cuts in multiples of 25bp and has shown willingness to ease when inflation moderates. CME FedWatch data would show if cuts are priced in; even with neutral/hawkish bias, 4 cuts total across full year is not extreme. Base rate of ~10-15% seems more justified than 4.1%, implying crowd is underpricing this scenario."}, "p_yes_market": 0.041499999999999995, "pricing_source": "mid", "snapshot": {"bestAsk": 0.043, "bestBid": 0.04, "id": "616906", "lastTradePrice": 0.041, "liquidity": "83867.65974", "question": "Will 4 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?", "slug": "will-4-fed-rate-cuts-happen-in-2026", "updatedAt": "2026-04-10T05:44:49.482054Z", "volume": "866723.6435499999"}, "spread": 0.0029999999999999957}

question: Will the Court Force Trump to Refund Tariffs?
notes: {"adapter_venue": "polymarket", "baseline_components": {}, "edge_vs_market": -0.08000000000000002, "llm": {"confidence": 0.72, "enabled": true, "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "rationale": "Tariff refund litigation faces structural headwinds: courts historically defer to executive tariff authority under broad statutory grants; Trump administration's legal positioning on tariff power is strong; successful precedent (past tariff cases) favors government. The crowd's 50-50 reflects genuine uncertainty, but base rates and legal doctrine slightly favor the government. Recent tariff litigation outcomes support skepticism of forced refunds."}, "p_yes_market": 0.5, "pricing_source": "mid", "snapshot": {"bestAsk": 0.51, "bestBid": 0.49, "id": "1126854", "lastTradePrice": 0.52, "liquidity": "26554.0701", "question": "Will the Court Force Trump to Refund Tariffs?", "slug": "will-the-court-force-trump-to-refund-tariffs-2026-06-30", "updatedAt": "2026-04-10T03:43:16.706819Z", "volume": "342650.3131300012"}, "spread": 0.020000000000000018}

question: Will Bitcoin hit $150k by June 30, 2026?
